paper_record.title: Light-Induced Topological Phase Transitions and Anomalous Thermal Transport in d-Wave Altermagnets
paper_record.abstract: We study intrinsic thermal transport and Floquet-engineered topology in a two-dimensional d wave altermagnetic topological insulator powered by linearly polarized light. We analyze the anomalous Hall, Nernst, and thermal Hall conductivities, as well as their spin-resolved equivalents, and develop closed-form formulas for the Berry curvature using an analytically calculated high-frequency effective Hamiltonian. We demonstrate that linearly polarized light, in contrast to conventional antiferromagnets, breaks the symmetry connecting spin sectors in altermagnets, allowing a series of spin-selective topological phase transitions from a quantum spin Hall state to a spin-polarized Chern insulator and finally to a trivial phase. The Nernst response shows substantial thermal activation and significant sensitivity to the gap size in the Chern domain, but both the electrical and thermal Hall responses become quantized and meet the anomalous Wiedemann Franz law. Every anomalous transport coefficient exhibits a distinctive d wave dependence on the polarization angle, reversing sign under orthogonal rotation and vanishing at symmetry-restoring directions. Our findings show a path to all-optical regulation of topological and caloritronic responses beyond traditional magnetic systems and establish thermal transport as a sensitive probe of altermagnetic order.

one_sentence_summary.zh: 研究了线偏振光诱导下d波交错磁体中的拓扑相变及其反常热输运性质。
one_sentence_summary.en: This study investigates light-induced topological phase transitions and anomalous thermal transport in d-wave altermagnets driven by linearly polarized light.

problem.zh: 探索如何利用Floquet工程（周期性光驱动）动态调控交错磁体的拓扑态，并研究其独特的反常热输运响应。
problem.en: The study explores how to dynamically control the topological states of altermagnets using Floquet engineering and investigates their unique anomalous thermal transport responses.

approach.zh: 采用四能带d波交错磁体模型，利用高频极限下的Floquet有效哈密顿量分析Berry曲率，并计算反常霍尔、能斯特及热霍尔电导。
approach.en: Using a four-band d-wave altermagnetic model, the authors analyze Berry curvature via a high-frequency Floquet effective Hamiltonian and calculate anomalous Hall, Nernst, and thermal Hall conductivities.

main_takeaway.zh: 线偏振光能打破交错磁体中连接不同自旋扇区的对称性，诱导自旋选择性的拓扑相变（从量子自旋霍尔态到手性绝缘体再到平庸相），这是传统反铁磁体所不具备的。
main_takeaway.en: Linearly polarized light breaks the symmetry connecting spin sectors in altermagnets, enabling spin-selective topological phase transitions (from QSH to Chern insulator to trivial phase), a feature absent in conventional antiferromagnets.

why_it_matters.zh: 提出了一种无需磁场即可全光调控拓扑输运和热电效应的方法，并证明了热输运是探测交错磁序的灵敏手段。
why_it_matters.en: It proposes an all-optical route to regulate topological transport and caloritronic effects without magnetic fields and establishes thermal transport as a sensitive probe for altermagnetic order.

reason.zh: 该研究将Floquet工程扩展到新兴的交错磁体领域，预测了独特的自旋选择性拓扑相变及其热输运特征。
reason.en: The study extends Floquet engineering to the emerging field of altermagnetism, predicting unique spin-selective topological transitions and thermal transport signatures.

reason.zh: 文章聚焦于凝聚态物理中的拓扑输运和磁性材料理论，符合该期刊的发表范畴。
reason.en: The paper focuses on topological transport and magnetic materials theory, which fits well within the scope of PRB.
